meaning: n.(用葡萄干、蜜饯果皮、杏仁等做成的松软的)意大利节日糕点
examples: Production of panettone lasts about four months, starting in September.

FLUFFY, dome-shaped, dotted with sultanas and candied citrus peel, panettone is an Italian Christmas cake.
So far there are no world records for the largest panettone, nor for the Russian version.
It has an extremely light texture, very similar to a panettone, and is one of my favorite sweet yeast breads.
